name: Ọnụ ọgụgụ AVPU
description: Ntụle nsụhọ nke ọkwa 4 ngwa ngwa. Ọ dị ọsọ karịa GCS maka nhazi mbụ.
instructions: Nyochaa ọkwa nzaghachi kachasị elu nke onye ọrịa gosipụtara.

scoring.label: Nti mkpu
scoring.description: Onye ọrịa na-amụ anya, mara, ma na-azakwa nke ọma

scoring.label: Olu
scoring.description: Onye ọrịa na-anabata naanị mkpali ọnụ

scoring.label: Mgbu
scoring.description: Onye ọrịa na-anabata naanị mkpali na-egbu mgbu (sternal rub, ntu akwa akwa)

scoring.label: Anaghị anabata
scoring.description: Enweghị nzaghachi nye mkpali ọ bụla -- enyemaka ụgbọ elu ozugbo achọrọ

interpretation.triage: Dị oke egwu - ụzọ ikuku dị n'ihe egwu, GCS na-abụkarị <= 8
Ngwa ngwa -- jikwaa ụgbọ elu ugbu a
